notableEvents.label: Pete Crow-Armstrong plunked
notableEvents.detail: Pete Crow-Armstrong hit by pitch. Michael Conforto to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pedro Ramírez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Ramírez grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Michael Conforto out at 2nd. Pedro Ramírez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jordan Walker GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Walker grounds into a double play, shortstop Dansby Swanson to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. JJ Wetherholt to 3rd. Iván Herrera out at 2nd. Jordan Walker out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Jordan Walker grounds into a double play, shortstop Dansby Swanson to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. JJ Wetherholt to 3rd. Iván Herrera out at 2nd. Jordan Walker out at 1st.
